posts.title: Anthropic's Project Glasswing - restricting Claude Mythos to security researchers - sounds necessary to me
posts.author: Simon Willison
posts.summary: Anthropic didn't release their latest model, Claude Mythos (system card PDF), today. They have instead made it available to a very restricted set of preview partners under their newly announced
posts.highlights: Anthropic is taking a cautious approach with Claude Mythos by restricting access to security researchers through Project Glasswing, rather than releasing it publicly. This reflects growing industry awareness of AI safety risks and the need for controlled testing before broader deployment.
posts.worthReading: The post offers timely insight into how leading AI companies are balancing innovation with safety, providing context on current industry practices around responsible AI deployment.
